---
title: "About"
---

FISH 546 — Bioinformatics for Environmental Sciences — University of Washington, School of Aquatic and Fishery Sciences. Taught by [Steven Roberts](http://faculty.washington.edu/sr320/) ([Roberts Lab](https://robertslab.github.io/resources/)).

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and published via GitHub Pages. Source: <https://github.com/course-fish546-2026>.
